LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT AOKI DIABETES RESERCH INSTITUTE DBA AOKI DIABETES MOTION TO QUASH SUMMONS AND DISMISS ACTION. NO APPEARANCE. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DENY MOTION TO QUASH AND DISMISS. COMPALINT IS PROPER, DECLARATORY RELIEF WAS FILED FIRST AND ALL ISSUES CAN BE RESOLVED IN THIS ACTION. SAN FRANCISCO IS PROPER VENUE. AOKI DIABETES RESEARCH INSTITUTE (ADRI) COULD HAVE FILED BREACH OF CONTRACT CLAIM IN SAN FRANCISCO BECAUSE PLAINTIFF BLUE SHIELDS PRINCIPAL PLACE OF BUSINESS IS SAN FRANCISCO. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647
